description: Human-verified enrichments for template/family change records that regex extraction cannot produce (hand-encoded rules text: conditional chains, level-banded values, add_strike/select encodings, trait-object replaces). Seeded into ~/.pfsrd2/enrichment.db by bin/pf2_seed_change_overrides as extraction_method='manual', human_verified=1. Keyed by (source_name, source_type, change_text) -> identity hash; a seed failure means the source text changed and the override needs re-review.

overrides.change_text: - Add a fangs Strike. It deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike and can be used to Feed. If the creature already has a jaws or fangs Strike, just add the Feed ability.
overrides.note: derived natural Strike (add_strike) with skip_if_weapons guard against existing jaws/fangs

overrides.change_text: - Add the amphibious trait. If the creature has the aquatic trait, remove it.
overrides.note: adds its own trait (regex read it as a removal), unconditional Aquatic swap with badge-array mirror; deliberate deviation: template-fixes lacks the mirror

overrides.change_text: - Add a resistance to cold and a weakness to fire, value dependent on the creature's level (see table below).
overrides.note: level-banded resistance+weakness pairs from adjustments table prose

overrides.change_text: - Reduce the creature's size to Tiny.
overrides.note: size trait badge replacement with full trait objects

value.name: Tiny
value.text: *Space:* Less than 5 feet, *Reach (Tall):* 0 feet, *Reach (Long):* 0 feet.  Multiple Tiny creatures can occupy the same square.  At least four can fit in a single square, though the GM might determine that even more can fit.  Tiny creatures can occupy a space larger creature as well, and if their reach is 0 feet, they must do so in order to attack.

Tiny creatures can occupy a space larger creature as well, and if their reach is 0 feet, they must do so in order to attack.

overrides.change_text: - Reduce the reach of the creature's lowest-reach melee Strikes to 0 feet. If it has melee Strikes with notable reach (often a tail, tentacle, or similar long appendage), reduce the reach of these Strikes to 5 feet.
overrides.note: set_reach baseline form: melee strikes without a Reach trait gain the canonical Reach trait at 0 ft (Tiny), notable-reach strikes drop to 5 ft (engine only ever lowers); closes the 0-ft half deferred as u0w4

item.name: Reach
item.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

overrides.change_text: - Add a resistance to fire and a weakness to cold, value dependent on the creature's level (see table below).
overrides.note: level-banded resistance+weakness pairs from adjustments table prose

overrides.change_text: - If the creature doesn't have a burrow Speed, add a burrow Speed equal to half its fastest speed.
overrides.note: tiered speed grants with presence guards from rules text

overrides.change_text: - Add a fly Speed equ al to its highest Speed.
overrides.note: tiered speed grants with presence guards from rules text

overrides.change_text: - Increase the creature’s level by 1; if the creature is level –1 or 0, instead increase its level by 2.
overrides.note: conditional level chain from rules text (level <=0 -> +2 / lvl 1 -> -2, default branch)

overrides.change_text: - Decrease the creature’s level by 1; if the creature is level 1, instead decrease its level by 2.
overrides.note: conditional level chain from rules text (level <=0 -> +2 / lvl 1 -> -2, default branch)

overrides.change_text: - Add a clan dagger to their items. Optionally, add a clan dagger melee Strike that deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike.
overrides.note: clan dagger gear grant + optional (select min 0) clan dagger add_strike with trait objects

selection.description: Optionally, add a clan dagger melee Strike that deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike.

overrides.change_text: - If the creature has the Athletics skill, reduce its modifier by 2.
overrides.note: conditional skill adjustment from prose

overrides.change_text: - Add a jaws Strike. It deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike.
overrides.note: derived natural Strike (add_strike) encoding rules text

overrides.change_text: - Add a jaws Strike. It deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike and has the agile and finesse traits.
overrides.note: derived natural Strike (add_strike) encoding rules text

overrides.change_text: - Add a beak Strike. It deals damage equal to the creature's lowest melee Strike and has the finesse trait.
overrides.note: derived natural Strike (add_strike) encoding rules text

overrides.change_text: - If the creature is 8th level or higher, give it a fly Speed of 25 feet. If its level is lower than that, you can give it this fly Speed if it either doesn't have ranged attacks or you remove its ranged attacks; use discretion.
overrides.note: tiered speed grants with presence guards from rules text

overrides.change_text: - Add tremorsense 60 feet (imprecise).
overrides.note: sense with parenthetical modifier (imprecise)

overrides.change_text: - Add a burrow Speed of 20 feet, or 40 feet if the creature is 8th level or higher.
overrides.note: tiered speed grants with presence guards from rules text

overrides.change_text: - If the creature's Strikes deal more than one die of damage, change one die to fire damage. If not, add 1 fire damage to its Strikes.
overrides.note: replace_one_die per RoE elemental rule; no flat-damage fallback

overrides.change_text: - Add a swim Speed of 25 feet, or 40 feet if the creature is 8th level or higher.
overrides.note: tiered speed grants with presence guards from rules text

overrides.change_text: - Add the wood trait. If the creature is a growing plant, you can also add the plant trait.
overrides.note: GM-discretionary selection / compound add-remove prose

selection.description: If the creature is a growing plant, you can also add the plant trait

overrides.change_text: - Add weaknesses to fire and to damage from axes depending on its level.
overrides.note: level-banded resistance+weakness pairs from adjustments table prose

overrides.change_text: - Add the following abilities.  **Low-Light Vision**
overrides.note: route change-attached abilities into the pool; engine diverts known senses at apply time

overrides.change_text: - Choose an Intelligence-, Wisdom-, or Charisma-based skill that's thematically important to the creature's office, such as Legal Lore for a judge. The creature gains the official bully ability for that skill.
overrides.note: deliberate deviation from template-fixes: replaces the junk 'Official Bully Ability For That' skill artifact with the ability routing the fabricated block carried

overrides.change_text: • Compulsions Vampires are creatures of strange and unknowable compulsions. A typical vampire can't voluntarily cross running water unless it is transported while it hides within its coffin, nor can it enter a private dwelling unless invited in by someone with the authority to do so. At your discretion, vampires might have different compulsions—a pirate vampire might not be able to set foot on solid ground without being invited, for example. The vampire can still be forced to do these things and might be able to overcome its compulsion just as it does its revulsion (see below).
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Compulsions
item.text: Vampires are creatures of strange and unknowable compulsions. A typical vampire can't voluntarily cross running water unless it is transported while it hides within its coffin, nor can it enter a private dwelling unless invited in by someone with the authority to do so. At your discretion, vampires might have different compulsions—a pirate vampire might not be able to set foot on solid ground without being invited, for example. The vampire can still be forced to do these things and might be able to overcome its compulsion just as it does its revulsion (see below).

overrides.change_text: • Revulsion A vampire can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of brandished garlic or a brandished religious symbol of a non-evil deity. To brandish garlic or a religious symbol, a creature must Interact to do so for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the vampire involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of its revulsion, it gains the fleeing condition, running from the object of its revulsion until it ends an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of its revulsion, a vampire can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, it overcomes its revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Revulsion
item.text: A vampire can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of brandished garlic or a brandished religious symbol of a non-evil deity. To brandish garlic or a religious symbol, a creature must Interact to do so for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the vampire involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of its revulsion, it gains the fleeing condition, running from the object of its revulsion until it ends an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of its revulsion, a vampire can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, it overcomes its revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).

overrides.change_text: • Sunlight If exposed to direct sunlight, a vampire immediately becomes slowed 1. The slowed value increases by 1 each time the vampire ends its turn in sunlight. If the vampire loses all its actions in this way, it is destroyed. Due to their supernatural aversion to light, vampires don't cast shadows or show a reflection in mirrors.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

If the vampire loses all its actions in this way, it is destroyed. Due to their supernatural aversion to light, vampires don't cast shadows or show a reflection in mirrors.

overrides.change_text: • Vulnerable to Decapitation A vrykolakas that is beheaded can't use its Feral Possession, and a beheaded corpse cannot rise as a vrykolakas.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Vulnerable to Decapitation

The slowed value increases by 1 each time the nosferatu ends their turn in sunlight, and the condition ends when they're no longer in sunlight. If the nosferatu loses all their actions in this way, they're destroyed.

item.name: Sunlight
item.text: If exposed to direct sunlight, a nosferatu immediately becomes slowed 1. The slowed value increases by 1 each time the nosferatu ends their turn in sunlight, and the condition ends when they're no longer in sunlight. If the nosferatu loses all their actions in this way, they're destroyed.

overrides.change_text: • Revulsion A jiang-shi can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or the sound of ringing handbells. A creature can Interact with a mirror or handbell to brandish or ring that item for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the jiang-shi involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of their revulsion, they gain the fleeing condition, running from the object of their revulsion until they are 10 feet or farther from the object. After 1 round of being exposed to the object of their revulsion, a jiang-shi can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Revulsion
item.text: A jiang-shi can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or the sound of ringing handbells. A creature can Interact with a mirror or handbell to brandish or ring that item for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the jiang-shi involuntarily comes within 10 feet of an object of their revulsion, they gain the fleeing condition, running from the object of their revulsion until they are 10 feet or farther from the object. After 1 round of being exposed to the object of their revulsion, a jiang-shi can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).

overrides.change_text:
• Bitter Epiphany A jiang-shi is afflicted by severe melancholia when reminded of their debased nature and the truth of their existential disconnection from living beings. When a jiang-shi sees an altar with at least 1 Bulk of food offerings to ancestor spirits, they must attempt a DC 25 Will save. They are then temporarily immune to bitter epiphany for 1 minute.
    Critical Success The jiang-shi is unaffected.
    Success The jiang-shi is stupefied 1 for 1 round.
    Failure The jiang-shi is stupefied 2 for 1 minute.
    Critical Failure The jiang-shi is stupefied 2 and confused for 1 minute.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

They are then temporarily immune to bitter epiphany for 1 minute.Critical Success The jiang-shi is unaffected.Success The jiang-shi is stupefied 1 for 1 round.Failure The jiang-shi is stupefied 2 for 1 minute.Critical Failure The jiang-shi is stupefied 2 and confused for 1 minute.

overrides.change_text: • Barred Senses A vetalarana can't see or sense through force effects or cold iron, and their mind can't penetrate force effects or cold iron. Such barriers can prevent the transference of a vetalarana's mind through Mental Rebirth.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Barred Senses
item.text: A vetalarana can't see or sense through force effects or cold iron, and their mind can't penetrate force effects or cold iron. Such barriers can prevent the transference of a vetalarana's mind through Mental Rebirth.

overrides.change_text: • Revulsion A vetalarana delights in consuming memories and secrets, and is disgusted by those who share such sensitive tidbits openly. A vetalarana can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a creature loudly voicing their intimate personal secrets or most cherished memories aloud. Speaking such information aloud with conviction is a single action that has the auditory, concentrate, and linguistic traits, and protects the creature until the start of its next turn. A vetalarana that involuntarily comes within 10 feet of a creature sharing such information gains the fleeing condition until they're 10 feet or farther from the creature. After 1 round of being exposed to the secrets of a creature, a vetalarana can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Revulsion
item.text: A vetalarana delights in consuming memories and secrets, and is disgusted by those who share such sensitive tidbits openly. A vetalarana can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a creature loudly voicing their intimate personal secrets or most cherished memories aloud. Speaking such information aloud with conviction is a single action that has the auditory, concentrate, and linguistic traits, and protects the creature until the start of its next turn. A vetalarana that involuntarily comes within 10 feet of a creature sharing such information gains the fleeing condition until they're 10 feet or farther from the creature. After 1 round of being exposed to the secrets of a creature, a vetalarana can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, they overcome their revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success).

overrides.change_text: • Revulsion Strigoi are uncomfortable near mirrors or sources of bright light. Only a strigoi's shadow reflects in a mirror, and this often compels them to cover or destroy mirrors in their presence rather than risk their true nature being displayed. A strigoi can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or source of bright light. To brandish a mirror or light source, a creature must Interact to do so for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the strigoi involuntarily comes within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or light source, it gains the fleeing condition, running from the brandished object until it ends an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of its revulsion, a strigoi can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, it overcomes its revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success). A strigoi can move normally around mirrors or bright light sources that are not brandished, although doing so causes them discomfort that can be noticed with a successful Perception check to Sense Motive.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Revulsion
item.text: Strigoi are uncomfortable near mirrors or sources of bright light. Only a strigoi's shadow reflects in a mirror, and this often compels them to cover or destroy mirrors in their presence rather than risk their true nature being displayed. A strigoi can't voluntarily come within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or source of bright light. To brandish a mirror or light source, a creature must Interact to do so for 1 round (similar to Raising a Shield). If the strigoi involuntarily comes within 10 feet of a brandished mirror or light source, it gains the fleeing condition, running from the brandished object until it ends an action beyond 10 feet. After 1 round of being exposed to the subject of its revulsion, a strigoi can attempt a DC 25 Will save as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. On a success, it overcomes its revulsions for 1d6 rounds (or 1 hour on a critical success). A strigoi can move normally around mirrors or bright light sources that are not brandished, although doing so causes them discomfort that can be noticed with a successful Perception check to Sense Motive.

overrides.change_text: • Water Revulsion A strigoi cannot cross a significant source of running water (such as a creek, river, or waves on a seashore). A strigoi capable of flight can cross running water provided it approaches no closer than 10 feet to the liquid's surface. If forced into running water against its will, the strigoi becomes slowed 2 and gains the fleeing condition as long as it remains in the water. At the end of any turn in which the strigoi remains in running water, it must succeed at a DC 5 flat check or be destroyed.
overrides.note: weakness/variant ability grant from li fragment: add_item automatic_abilities (name from bold lead)

item.name: Water Revulsion
item.text: A strigoi cannot cross a significant source of running water (such as a creek, river, or waves on a seashore). A strigoi capable of flight can cross running water provided it approaches no closer than 10 feet to the liquid's surface. If forced into running water against its will, the strigoi becomes slowed 2 and gains the fleeing condition as long as it remains in the water. At the end of any turn in which the strigoi remains in running water, it must succeed at a DC 5 flat check or be destroyed.
